title: HMBWIA Steel
description: Commissioned mod to just add steel.
body:
**H**old **M**y **B**eer **W**hile **I** **A**dd Steel

Somebody on the Fabric discord asked for a mod that just added steel. It looked like nobody was going to do it, so I said "Hold my beer."

As per the request, steel is made by crafting 2 iron ingots and 2 coal (shapeless) to get 1 crude steel, which must be blasted (not smelted) to get 1 steel ingot. All armor and tools can be crafted as expected out of steel ingots. Steel nuggets work and things can be blasted or smelted into them. Steel blocks as storage work as well.

You can craft anvils, cauldrons, blast furnaces, flint and steel, hoppers and smithing tables from steel instead of iron, though I'm personally not sure why you'd want to, it's there.

All in all, this was quick and easy to throw together, so I figured why not do it for free.

Art is by herobrinebot462, code and .json are by obsidian29.

I don't intend to keep this updated, because the requester only wanted it for a 1.20.1 modpack. All rights are reserved - you cannot use the textures without herobrinebot462's explicit permission, you cannot use the code without obsidian29's explicit permission. If you find this mod on another site, it was REPOSTED ILLEGALLY and if whoever did it was willing to do _that_, well then they might have tampered with the jar file, right? :)
